log: --- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:10+-2=8 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 45/67
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 45/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:6+3=9 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 133/138
REASONING: Throwing rock at Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:13+9=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 31 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 14/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 7 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: 7/67
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 7/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (7/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician.
→ Javelin: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 21 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: -14/67
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:11+3=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:3+-2=1 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:6+-2=4 vs DC 16] FAIL!
